prompt: Build a hero card with title and body in a vertical stack.
Form-like stack with title text and submit button.
openui:
root = Stack([title, submit], "vertical")
title = Text(":form.title")
submit = Button(":form.submit")

root = Stack([left, right], "horizontal", 12)
left = Card(":col.left.title", ":col.left.body")
right = Card(":col.right.title", ":col.right.body")

prompt: Use an unusually large gap between stacked cards.
openui:
root = Stack([a, b], "vertical", 64)
a = Card(":rare.a.title", ":rare.a.body")
b = Card(":rare.b.title", ":rare.b.body")

prompt: Dashboard-like layout with header text and two metric cards.
openui:
root = Stack([header, row], "vertical")
header = Text(":dash.header")
row = Stack([m1, m2], "horizontal")
m1 = Card(":dash.m1.title", ":dash.m1.body")
m2 = Card(":dash.m2.title", ":dash.m2.body")
